testSteps.description: Given that the user wants to manage the pet records
When they create a new pet with name "Pluto" and status "available"

children.description: User adds a new pet with name com.petstore.models.Pet@1b0e9707.name
User executes a POST on the resource /pet

userStory.narrative:
As a user of the PetStore API
  I want to be able to create, consult, update, and delete pets
  To ensure the integrity of the pet records
